goal: Assess whether the 98 joined local rows and 20 validation rows are sufficient for any future robustness claim.
required_before_execution: Define minimum row/date/symbol thresholds and missingness policy before any future rerun.
notes: Current result is pipeline-valid but too small for broad performance claims.

goal: Design fixed alternate chronological split diagnostics without selection or tuning.
required_before_execution: Pre-register all split variants, acceptance fields, and no-selection interpretation.
notes: Any future split diagnostics must report all variants, not select a winner.

goal: Check whether validation label balance is stable enough for interpretation.
required_before_execution: Predefine label-balance warnings and prohibit threshold tuning.
notes: No threshold or class-weight tuning is allowed from this plan.

goal: Confirm that the six Stage 1 formula hashes remain locked and are not ranked or filtered.
required_before_execution: Create a formula-hash manifest lock before any future rerun.
notes: Use all fixed hashes together or block the run.

goal: Re-audit point-in-time fields, label isolation, and embargo rules before broader training.
current_evidence: PIT passed in Stage 1 audit; broader sample not full training coverage.
required_before_execution: Define PIT/visible_at/usable_from/label_end checks for every joined row.
notes: No post-cutoff data or OOS rerun is permitted by this plan.

goal: Plan paper-only cost, symbol concentration, and failure diagnostics for ML v2 outputs.
required_before_execution: Define shadow-only score-to-diagnostic mapping without order output.
notes: Any cost/concentration work remains diagnostic and cannot produce orders.

goal: Keep robustness results from becoming a model-selection or promotion decision.
current_evidence: No model winner declared; no candidate decision allowed.
required_before_execution: Add a separate no-selection interpretation gate before any future robustness execution.
notes: This plan cannot authorize trading, promotion, or production readiness.

required_before_execution: User-approved future checkpoint with fixed, pre-registered diagnostics.
notes: Next step should be a gate/design checkpoint, not immediate rerun.
